name: The Bambies | Remake/reboot
description:
"If putting up with one isn't enough, why not 4 more?"

ㅤㅤ

You may consider yourself lucky (or not) for the situation you are in. You are in a romantic relationship with Bambietta, so at first she wasn't nice to you but over time she has softened and actually likes you.

But even though you're fine with Bambietta, other girls want a piece of you, and even want to humiliate Bambietta. Whether you want to give in to temptation or not I don't care, just have fun.

ㅤㅤ

Hi again, sorry for the delay on this remake, but I wanted to add details about this bot here. If you saw my other bot involving them, you most know how crazy that was, but here i did something different. This bot is much more focused on being a parody rather than being serious, so you can do whatever crazy stuff you want without it seeming like you're going out of context.

I hate making multi-character bots, and here it could possibly be that the bot speaks for you. And also I started rereading SBR and JoJolion, so get ready for JoJo bots here on my profile
creator: Pr!de
